title: Gold prices fall as Trump tempers Powell firing fears Gold prices fell on Thursday morning, as the dollar strengthened and US president Donald Trump tempered fears that he planned to fire Fed chair Jerome Powell.
Trending tickers: TSMC, Netflix, Rigetti, Novartis and EasyJet The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Thursday.

Wall Street and FTSE higher as US jobless claims fall and UK unemployment rises Britain's unemployment rate rose to 4.7% in the March to May quarter, according to the Office for National Statistics — higher than economists had expected.
